data.content: Implementation review rejected: src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:796-810 still hardcodes the implementation-biased preamble inside wrapSingleBeatPrompt(). buildNextTakePrompt() reuses that wrapper at src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:990 for subsequent take-loop iterations, so review-step claims can still be wrapped with 'Implement the following task...' after a step-failure rollback or any queued review iteration. This does not fully satisfy the requirement that review steps instruct the agent to review rather than implement. Add step-aware wrapping in the take-loop path and cover it with a terminal-manager test.
